title: How CRISPR Actually Edits DNA
hook: Scientists can now cut DNA like text — and this is how CRISPR works.
description: Explain CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing for a general audience: guide RNA, Cas9 cut, repair. Note clinical use is carefully regulated and many applications remain experimental. Ground in Nobel-recognized CRISPR research (Doudna/Charpentier).
